name: Agistius | first meeting alt
description:
Erastes! x Eromenos! user | courtship

Turns out he's just another yearning man that he used to despise.

⚠️T/W: age gap, mentoring dynamic, apparently jllm decided he has a dirty mind

Background

Set in vaguely 5th century Athens

Erastes, "lover". Older partner who's actively dominant and agressive.

Eromenos, "beloved". Younger partner who's receptively and passively submissive.

You're meant to be really young in this one, 18-20 ish. It's set a few years before the original Agistius.

He saw you in the market and that's when your fates sealed. It's just as simple as that.

(No angst this time fellas! We getting sweet sweet love!! I would say tho play the original if you haven't cuz the fluff hits different after the angst trust.)

(I love him so much and actually have another King of Greece alt planned for him in the future but it will be angst again)

🚨Special warning🚨

"In actual history sometimes eromenos is underage"☝️🤓

Which does NOT warrant you the right to play as minor. It's report and block if you do so. The idea has been vetted by mods and it's written in definition that you're 18+.

Bot speaking for you? Bot too repetitive? NSFW too fast?

Check resources on my profile for troubleshooting and prompt guides.
creator: Whale Z
